# Extracao: transcription_mp3_8-04_Take_Everything_You_Do_to_Another_Level

- **Fonte:** transcription_mp3_8-04_Take_Everything_You_Do_to_Another_Level.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

Take everything you do to another level. This is what all the greats do. They're motivated by the next level. Whether it was a phone or a car or clothing or a purse, you name it. Shoes, whatever. Airplanes. You know what? Airplanes, nobody's done anything significant with airplanes for 40 or 50 years. No wonder the industry sucks. Why? Because nobody's taking it to another level. Virgin American comes out or Virgin Airlines comes out. They take it to another level and everybody's like, oh, I love that man. I'd rather pay to fly Virgin than pay maybe to fly Delta. Why? Because the guy there took it to another level. That's what you need to do. Don't just let other people be doing this. Figure out. Go to sleep at night thinking, how can I take my career to another level? How can I take this and disrupt the industry? How can I take what I do to a completely different level? Look, ask yourself good questions and you'll be motivated. Ask yourself how you can reach greatness rather than average or good and you're going to be motivated. Take everything you do to that next level and ask yourself that question. How can I take what maybe another company has done and take it to a completely another level? You will be motivated. You will be inspired and you'll be energetic.
